project.name: Hybrid ABW Command Surface
project.description: Hệ thống Hybrid Anti-Brain-Wiki (ABW) cho Antigravity IDE, cung cấp cơ chế reasoning 3 tầng (Tier 1/2/3) và bộ installer bền bỉ (hardened).

workflows.purpose: Standardized Agent Behavior & Hybrid ABW Tiers

tiers.name: Tier 2: Deliberative Path
tiers.logic: Bounded Test-Time Compute (TTC) with self-critique loop.

tiers.name: Tier 3: Bootstrap Path
tiers.logic: Reasoning for greenfield projects with no prior knowledge.

conventions.convention: Nếu thiếu dữ liệu hoặc MCP down, log Gap thay vì hallucinate.
Không truncate block AWF cũ trong GEMINI.md, thực hiện append an toàn.
